assertions.expectation: Recommends increasing maxSurge for CPU pools (e.g., 10-20) to parallelize node replacements, with justification for the value
assertions.reason: Response recommends maxSurge=10 for CPU pools with clear justification that this enables up to 20 CPU nodes upgrading simultaneously, hitting GKE's parallelism limit

assertions.expectation: For GPU pools with fixed reservations: recommends increasing maxUnavailable (not maxSurge) as the primary lever since surge capacity is typically unavailable
assertions.reason: Response correctly recommends maxUnavailable=3 for GPU pools instead of maxSurge, explicitly stating that fixed reservations can't provision surge nodes and this is the primary speed lever

assertions.expectation: Advises checking and requesting increased compute quota before the upgrade for CPU pools
assertions.reason: Response does not mention checking or requesting increased compute quota for CPU pools before the upgrade

assertions.expectation: Suggests staggering node pool upgrades or running non-conflicting pools in parallel
assertions.reason: Response provides a strategic sequencing plan: start both CPU pools simultaneously, then start both GPU pools after CPU pools complete, with clear rationale for this staggering approach

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE's auto-scale blue-green upgrade strategy as an option for GPU pools
assertions.reason: Response mentions autoscaled blue-green upgrade strategy for GPU pools as an alternative for critical speed, noting it requires 2x GPU capacity temporarily

assertions.expectation: Recommends expanding the maintenance window or splitting across multiple weekends
assertions.reason: Response does not recommend expanding the maintenance window or splitting upgrades across multiple weekends - it focuses on optimizations to fit within the existing 8-hour window

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command for updating surge settings on each pool
assertions.reason: Response provides specific gcloud container node-pools update commands for configuring surge settings on both CPU and GPU pools with exact parameters

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to track upgrade progress in real-time
assertions.reason: Response includes watch commands to monitor upgrade progress: 'watch kubectl get nodes -o wide -L cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool' and 'watch kubectl get nodes -o wide'
